label_verbatim: (Name of Corporation)
rationale: Primary entity name field at top of the form.

label_verbatim: FIRST: officers and directors are: President — Name
rationale: President name (row 1 of officer roster). Capacity is fixed by the row label ('President'), so the widget captures only the name. Roster pattern follows MBCA-12 convention from `2026-04-30-officer-roster-pattern.md`.

label_verbatim: FIRST: officers and directors are: President — Address
rationale: President address (single combined widget, not split into street/city_state_zip on this form).

FIRST: officers and directors are: Directors — Name (row 1)
rationale: Director #1 name (row 5 — first 'Directors' row). Capacity for rows 5-7 is 'Director'.

label_verbatim: FIRST: officers and directors are: Directors — Address (row 1)
FIRST: officers and directors are: Directors — Name (row 2)
FIRST: officers and directors are: Directors — Address (row 2)
FIRST: officers and directors are: Directors — Name (row 3)
rationale: Director #3 name (row 7). Form notes '(List additional directors on reverse side)' for any beyond row 7.

label_verbatim: FIRST: officers and directors are: Directors — Address (row 3)
SECOND: All members of the corporation entitled to vote.
SECOND: All directors of the corporation, there being no members or no members entitled to vote.
THIRD: The address of the registered office of the corporation in the State of Maine is ___
rationale: Inline blank at end of THIRD sentence ('is ___'). Form uses 'registered office' terminology but Maine law treats this as the registered agent's physical office; mapping to the existing registered_agent namespace for synth/rubric reuse.

label_verbatim: THIRD: (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Full-width second line under THIRD for street/city/state/zip. Same canonical key as widget 18; either inline-only or wrapped — synth should write the complete address into the widget that bounds it best (typically widget 19, full-width).

label_verbatim: DATED ___
*By ___ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — first signer
rationale: First *By signer's printed name and capacity (Shape D combined). Right side, upper position.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — second signer
rationale: Second *By signer's printed name and capacity (Shape D combined). Right side, lower position. Form footnote 'MUST be signed by any authorized officer' (singular) — second slot is optional but provided for entities preferring two-signer execution.
